name: Easy Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Place 1 cup sugar in a food processor; blend for 30 seconds (or use fruit sugar).
3. Add to softened butter and cream mixture until very fluffy.
4. Combine flour and rice flour.
5. Beat into batter in small portions.
6. Turn batter out onto a lightly floured surface. Knead until smooth, adding up to 1/2 cup more all-purpose flour if needed.
7. Press into a 15 x 9 jelly roll pan.
8. Score into bars with a sharp knife.
9. Prick the surface with a fork.
10. Sprinkle with remaining 2 tablespoons sugar.
11. Bake for 10 minutes, then lower heat to 300°F and bake until golden, about 30 to 40 minutes.
12. Cut along scored lines, cool, and store in an air-tight container.
